final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire en,
    output reg [7:0] count
    );

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 8'b11111111;
    end else if (en) begin
        count <= count - 1;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
